name: progress-circle
description: SVG circular progress indicator with configurable size, stroke width, color, and percentage label.

props.name: value
props.description: Progress value from 0 to 100; clamped automatically

props.name: size
props.description: Diameter of the SVG circle in pixels; defaults to theme size token

props.name: strokeWidth
props.description: Width of the progress stroke in pixels

props.name: showValue
props.description: Whether to display the numeric percentage in the center

props.name: color
props.description: Color of the progress arc; defaults to the primary theme color

props.name: label
props.description: Optional caption text rendered below the percentage value
